en_title: Supergirl Inches Past $100 Million at the Global Box Office After One of the Biggest Second Weekend Drops in Superhero Movie History
cn_title: 《超级少女》全球票房破亿美元，第二周末跌幅惨烈
subtitle: 起飞失败
opus_summary: 《超级少女》全球票房勉强突破1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)，但第二周末北美票房暴跌74%，跻身超级英雄电影史上最惨跌幅之一。按目前走势，影片可能很难达到此前预期。

paragraphs.en: Supergirl has managed to inch past $100 million at the global box office, but its second weekend in theaters also saw it secure one of the biggest drops in superhero movie history.
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》全球票房总算勉强突破1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)，但影片上映第二个周末也录得超级英雄电影史上最大跌幅之一。

paragraphs.en: It's yet another disappointing update for the DCU following its sophomore installment's already rough opening weekend . Despite managing to reach $100.47 million globally, Supergirl, which stars Milly Alcock as its title character, only brought in $9.6 million domestically and $9.4 million internationally during its second weekend in theaters.
paragraphs.cn: 对DCU来说，这是继第二部作品开画周末表现不佳之后，又一个令人失望的消息。由Milly Alcock主演的《超级少女》全球票房虽然达到1.0047亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)，但上映第二个周末北美只收入960万美元(约合人民币6500万元)，海外也只有940万美元(约合人民币6400万元)。

paragraphs.en: That's down 74% from last weekend's $37.1 million domestic opening and a crushing blow to Warner Bros. and DC. The decline lands it among other comic book movies with historically low second-weekend drops, such as Joker: Folie à Deux ( 81% ), Morbius ( 74% ), The Marvels ( 78% ), and The Flash ( 72% ). With the holiday weekend coming to a close, Supergirl's worldwide total now hovers just above $100 million, coming in fourth at the global box office behind Minions & Monsters (first), Toy Story 5 (second), and Young Washington (third).
paragraphs.cn: 这比上周末3710万美元(约合人民币3亿元)的北美开画成绩下跌74%，对华纳兄弟和DC都是沉重打击。这个跌幅让它跻身漫画改编电影史上第二周末跌幅最惨的一档，与《小丑2：双重妄想》（81%）、《莫比亚斯》（74%）、《惊奇队长2》（78%）和《闪电侠》（72%）并列。随着假日周末结束，《超级少女》全球总票房目前略高于1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)，在全球票房榜上排名第四，落后于第一名《Minions & Monsters》、第二名《玩具总动员5》和第三名《Young Washington》。

paragraphs.en: Supergirl was deemed a box office bomb when it debuted to a global total of $68 million following its June 26 premiere. The Warner Bros. superhero movie reportedly had a $170 million production budget and $120 million marketing budget, suggesting the studio would need around $300 million just to break even.
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》6月26日上映后，全球开画票房为6800万美元(约合人民币5亿元)，当时就已被视为票房失败。据报道，这部华纳兄弟超级英雄电影制作成本为1.7亿美元(约合人民币12亿元)，营销预算为1.2亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)，意味着片方大约需要3亿美元(约合人民币20亿元)才能回本。

paragraphs.en: The film's theatrical run was previously projected to accumulate around $200 million – a number that would put it at a $100 million loss – but a 74% drop suggests the studio will have to fight tooth and nail just to reach even that goal. Despite Supergirl's position as the second installment in the DCU and a pivotal moment for DC Studios, a steep decline makes it seem as though things won't be looking up anytime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 此前外界预计本片院线总票房约为2亿美元(约合人民币14亿元)，这个数字已经意味着它会亏损1亿美元(约合人民币7亿元)。但74%的跌幅表明，片方就连达到这个目标也必须拼尽全力。尽管《超级少女》是DCU第二部作品，也是DC Studios的关键节点，如此陡峭的下滑仍让前景看起来短期内难有起色。

paragraphs.en: "While Supergirl didn’t meet our box office expectations," DC Studios co-CEO Safran told The New York Times following its disappointing opening weekend, "it’s just one component of a broader, long-term strategy at DC Studios that we remain confident in."
paragraphs.cn: 在《超级少女》开画周末表现令人失望后，DC Studios联合CEO Safran对《纽约时报》表示：「虽然《超级少女》没有达到我们的票房预期，但它只是DC Studios更宏大长期战略中的一个组成部分，而我们仍然对这套战略有信心。」

paragraphs.en: While Superman kicked off the DCU with a bang, comic book movie fans are hoping Supergirl doesn't derail an otherwise promising cinematic universe. Up next on the movie side of things is the body horror offshoot, Clayface , which is set with an October 2026 release date. Superman sequel Man of Tomorrow is currently scheduled to save the day in July 2027. For TV watchers, Lanterns is set to premiere in August.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管《超人》为DCU开了个好头，漫画电影粉丝仍希望《超级少女》不要让这个原本前景不错的电影宇宙偏离轨道。电影方面，接下来登场的是身体恐怖衍生片《Clayface》，目前定于2026年10月上映。《超人》续集《Man of Tomorrow》则计划于2027年7月救场。电视方面，《Lanterns》定于8月开播。

paragraphs.en: Alcock will return in Man of Tomorrow, with Safran teasing that she'll play an important role in follow-up DCU projects . For more, you can check out IGN's 6/10 Supergirl review . You can also read about some behind-the-scenes details that suggest creative differences between Gunn and director Craig Gillespie impacted the final product .
paragraphs.cn: Alcock将在《Man of Tomorrow》中回归，Safran也透露她会在后续DCU项目中扮演重要角色。更多内容可以查看IGN给《超级少女》打出的6分评测，也可以阅读一些幕后细节，了解Gunn与导演Craig Gillespie之间的创作分歧如何影响了最终成片。
